SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_OS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was only populated 2007–2012. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather 
than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding 
coinsurance variable called (PRE_ICL_MONPP_COINS_OS).
